nasb.text: They *brought to Him one who was deaf and spoke with difficulty, and they *implored Him to lay His hand on him.

esv.text: And they brought to him a man who was deaf and had a speech impediment, and they begged him to lay his hand on him.

cnv.text: 有人帶著一個又聾又啞的人到他那裡，求耶穌按手在他身上。

ccb.text: 有人带着一个又聋又哑的人来见耶稣，恳求祂把手按在这个人身上。

csbs.text: 有人把一个又聋又哑的人带到耶稣面前，恳求耶稣按手在他身上。
